source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT
hd.[SalesOrderID],
hd.[OrderDate],
hd.[CustomerID],
hd.[SubTotal],
hd.[TaxAmt],
hd.[Freight],
hd.[TotalDue],
dt.[OrderQty],
dt.[ProductID],
dt.[UnitPrice],
dt.[UnitPriceDiscount],
dt.[LineTotal]
FROM
[SalesLT].[SalesOrderHeader] hd
INNER JOIN
[SalesLT].[SalesOrderDetail] dt
ON hd.[SalesOrderID] = dt.[SalesOrderID]

content.query:
CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE mycsvdata
WITH
(
    LOCATION = 'https://laxmynicdatastorage.blob.core.windows.net/data'
)

CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT csvformat
WITH
(
    FORMAT_TYPE = DELIMITEDTEXT,
    FORMAT_OPTIONS
    (
        FIELD_TERMINATOR = ',',
        FIRST_ROW = 2
    )
)

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE csvExtTable
(
    [Correlationid]    VARCHAR(200),
    [Operationname]    VARCHAR(300),
    [Status]           VARCHAR(100),
    [Eventcategory]    VARCHAR(100),
    [Level]            VARCHAR(100),
    [Time]             VARCHAR(100),
    [Subscription]     VARCHAR(200),
    [Eventinitiatedby] VARCHAR(1000),
    [Resourcetype]     VARCHAR(300),
    [Resourcegroup]    VARCHAR(1000),
    [Resource]         VARCHAR(2000)
)
WITH
(
    LOCATION = '/countries.csv',
    DATA_SOURCE = mycsvdata,
    FILE_FORMAT = csvformat
) 

SELECT * FROM csvExtTable

CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE pqtdatasource
WITH
(
    LOCATION = 'https://laxmynicdatastorage.blob.core.windows.net/data'
)


CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT pqtformat
WITH
(
     FORMAT_TYPE = PARQUET,
    DATA_COMPRESSION = 'org.apache.hadoop.io.compress.SnappyCodec'
)

DROP EXTERNAL TABLE pqtExtTable

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE pqtExtTable
(
    [Correlationid]    VARCHAR(200),
    [Operationname]    VARCHAR(300),
    [Status]           VARCHAR(100),
    [Eventcategory]    VARCHAR(100),
    [Level]            VARCHAR(100),
    [Time]             VARCHAR(100),
    [Subscription]     VARCHAR(200),
    [Eventinitiatedby] VARCHAR(1000),
    [Resourcetype]     VARCHAR(300),
    [Resourcegroup]    VARCHAR(1000),
    [Resource]         VARCHAR(2000)
)
WITH
(
    LOCATION = '/folder/*.parquet',
    DATA_SOURCE = pqtdatasource,
    FILE_FORMAT = pqtformat
) 

SELECT count(*) FROM pqtExtTable

SELECT * 
  FROM OPENROWSET 
  (
    BULK 'https://laxmynicdatastorage.dfs.core.windows.net/data/folder/*.parquet',
    FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
  ) AS [mytable]

  SELECT * 
  FROM OPENROWSET 
  (
    BULK 'https://laxmynicdatastorage.blob.core.windows.net/data/folder/*.parquet',
    FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
  ) AS [mytable]

CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE pqt_ext_data_source
WITH
(
    LOCATION = 'https://laxmynicdatastorage.blob.core.windows.net/data'
)

CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT pqt_file_format
WITH
(
    FORMAT_TYPE = PARQUET,
    DATA_COMPRESSION = 'org.apache.hadoop.io.compress.SnappyCodec'
)

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE pqt_Ext_Table
(
    [Correlationid]    VARCHAR(200),
    [Operationname]    VARCHAR(300),
    [Status]           VARCHAR(100),
    [Eventcategory]    VARCHAR(100),
    [Level]            VARCHAR(100),
    [Time]             VARCHAR(100),
    [Subscription]     VARCHAR(200),
    [Eventinitiatedby] VARCHAR(1000),
    [Resourcetype]     VARCHAR(300),
    [Resourcegroup]    VARCHAR(1000),
    [Resource]         VARCHAR(2000)
)
WITH
(
    LOCATION = '/folder/*.parquet',
    DATA_SOURCE = pqt_ext_data_source,
    FILE_FORMAT = pqt_file_format
) 

SELECT * FROM csv_Ext_Table

CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE csv_ext_data_source
WITH
(
    LOCATION = 'https://laxmynicdatastorage.dfs.core.windows.net/data'
)

CREATE TABLE ActivityLog
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN
) AS SELECT * FROM pqt_ext_table

SELECT * FROM ActivityLog

CREATE TABLE ActivityLogTable
(
    [Correlationid]    VARCHAR(200),
    [Operationname]    VARCHAR(300),
    [Status]           VARCHAR(100),
    [Eventcategory]    VARCHAR(100),
    [Level]            VARCHAR(100),
    [Time]             VARCHAR(100),
    [Subscription]     VARCHAR(200),
    [Eventinitiatedby] VARCHAR(1000),
    [Resourcetype]     VARCHAR(300),
    [Resourcegroup]    VARCHAR(1000),
    [Resource]         VARCHAR(2000)
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN
)

SELECT * FROM ActivityLog

DELETE FROM ActivityLog

COPY INTO ActivityLogTable
FROM 'https://laxmynicdatastorage.blob.core.windows.net/data/folder/ActivityLog01.parquet'
WITH
(
    FILE_TYPE = 'PARQUET',
    CREDENTIAL = 
    (
        IDENTITY = 'Shared Access Signature',
        SECRET = 'sv=2024-11-04&ss=bfqt&srt=sco&sp=rwdlacupyx&se=2026-03-20T10:01:20Z&st=2026-03-20T01:46:20Z&spr=https&sig=EtGH8mEY5qRVO7luGn9HoGCeGHrTn0yjmGoAw%2B%2Fs79g%3D'
    )
)

DROP TABLE SalesOrderDetail

CREATE TABLE SalesOrderDetail
(
    SalesOrderID         INT,
    SalesOrderDetailID   INT,
    OrderQty             SMALLINT,
    ProductID            INT,
    UnitPrice            MONEY,
    UnitPriceDiscount    MONEY,
    LineTotal            DECIMAL,
    rowguid              UNIQUEIDENTIFIER,
    ModifiedDate         DATETIME
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = HASH (SalesOrderDetailID),
    CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)

SELECT count(*) FROM SalesOrderDetail

CREATE TABLE FactSales
(
    SalesOrderID      INT       NOT NULL,
    OrderDate         DATETIME  NOT NULL,
    CustomerID        INT       NOT NULL,
    SubTotal          MONEY     NOT NULL,
    TaxAmt            MONEY     NOT NULL,
    Freight           MONEY     NOT NULL,
    TotalDue          MONEY     NOT NULL,
    OrderQty          INT,
    ProductID         INT       NOT NULL,
    UnitPrice         MONEY     NOT NULL,
    UnitPriceDiscount MONEY     NOT NULL,
    LineTotal         DECIMAL   NOT NULL
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN
)

SELECT ProductID, Count(SalesOrderID) 
  FROM FactSales
GROUP BY ProductID

create table data_source_table
(
    PersonID int,
    Name varchar(255),
    LastModifytime datetime
);

INSERT INTO data_source_table
(PersonID, Name, LastModifytime)
VALUES
(6,'aaaa', '9/6/2017 12:56:00 AM'),
(7,'bbbb', '9/7/2017 5:23:00 AM'),
(8,'cccc', '9/8/2017 2:36:00 AM'),
(9,'dddd', '9/9/2017 3:21:00 AM'),
(10,'eeee', '9/10/2017 8:06:00 AM');

SELECT max(lastmodifytime) as NewWatermarkvalue from data_source_table

SELECT * from data_source_table

create table watermarktable
(
    Tablename varchar(255),
    watermarkvalue datetime
);

INSERT INTO watermarktable
VALUES('data_source_table', '1/1/2010 12:00:00 AM')

select * from watermarktable
